title: Laputan
description: Gaussian Size & Attribute Variation for Mobs
body:
Fork of [Lilliputian](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lilliputian) by cadaverous_queen (MIT license), a mod that allows random size variation for mobs.

- Changes size distribution to **gaussian** instead of uniform - this allows extreme variations in size to be more rare and rewarding to come across.
- Scales **max health**, **movement speed**, **attack damage**, **knockback resistance**, **follow range** and **flying speed** to size by configurable amounts.
- Allows additional random variation in these 6 stats by configurable percentage amounts.
- Accurate hitboxes for all mods and sizes.
- No visual "pop-in" effect for mob resizings.
- Highly optimized for performance and bug-free.

Unlike Lilliputian, the config allows you to configure the "sigma" value for each mod (instead of the range) which determines how much size variation the mob undergoes (defaults to 0.0 which is no variation, I recommend 24.0).

Works with all modded entities I tested except Ice & Fire's sea serpent, Fossils & Archeology's dinosaurs (mostly), and Frikinzi's Fauna. It is recommended to blacklist these.

See also [Lecovian](https://modrinth.com/mod/lecovian).
